rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Possible Raspberry Robin DLL Download Using msiexec (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Possible Raspberry Robin DLL Download Using msiexec (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: 60a7350b-38b0-4f44-b2e8-e7b284516bd0
status: experimental
description: Detects msiexec used to download a potentially-malicious Raspberry Robin
  DLL. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/raspberry-robin/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith: \msiexec.exe
  selection_cmd_1:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - 'http:'
    - 'https:'
  selection_cmd_2:
    CommandLine|contains|windash: /q
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
